Home › Brevard County › Indialantic › Vegetarian Restaurants

Vegetarian Restaurants in Indialantic

A high rating isn't a clean kitchen — BUNKY'S RAW BAR & GRILL proves it here, 4.5 stars on an F grade. That's why each of these 6 restaurants with vegetarian options in Indialantic shows its health inspection result, not just its stars.

6 vegetarian restaurants

  • A 95 L
    LONG DOGGERS American ★ 4.6 (2602) Indialantic · Brevard County VegHealthy Inspected Apr 2026
  • B 85 C
    CUBAN ISLAND RESTAURANT American ★ 4.5 (1738) Indialantic · Brevard County VeganVeg +4 more Inspected Mar 2026
  • B 82 O
    ORIGINAL BIZZARRO FAMOUS NEW YORK PIZZA Other ★ 4.5 (2892) Indialantic · Brevard County Veg Inspected Apr 2026
  • B 81 C
    CANTINA DOS AMIGOS Mexican ★ 4.1 (1654) Indialantic · Brevard County VegGF +3 more Inspected Mar 2026
  • C 72 B
    BLUEBERRY MUFFIN Other ★ 4.3 (1700) Indialantic · Brevard County VegHealthy Inspected May 2026
  • F 58 B
    BUNKY'S RAW BAR & GRILL American ★ 4.5 (2780) Indialantic · Brevard County VegGF +5 more Inspected Jan 2026
